meta.title: Behind the Scenes Photoshop - "Goodnight Moon" Livestream with Everyday Astronaut
meta.description:
Live streamed on 1/6/2017 on twitch.tv/everydayastronaut

Photo was shot live on Instagram @EverydayAstronaut
